data.revised_prompt: cinematic realistic watercolor book illustration, professional visual for a Chinese 30-minute book-summary video, quiet Kamakura and Izu Oshima atmosphere, Japanese seaside town, camellia flowers, paper letters, fountain pens, warm natural film lighting, detailed environment, emotional healing tone, soft but rich colors, storybook realism, consistent art direction across a 24-image sequence, 16:9, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. Main protagonist: one East Asian woman in her early 30s, shoulder-length black hair, soft cream cardigan, calm tired eyes. Mother: East Asian woman in her late 50s with short grey hair and muted green cardigan, clearly older than the protagonist. Daughter: teenage East Asian girl with school uniform and ponytail, clearly much younger. When a scene includes multiple people, make them different ages, different clothes, different hairstyles, different faces. Scene 04/24, story beat: Teenage daughter at doorway. Composition: narrow hallway with sliding door half open, a teenage daughter in school uniform stands at the doorway with a guarded expression, the protagonist is farther inside the room, emotional distance shown by the architecture. People rule: two people only, adult protagonist and teenage daughter, very different ages. Keep this image narratively connected to the nearby subtitle meaning, but do not draw readable words: 束那个夜晚鸠子和蜜朗一起在院子里放烟火线香花火最后一束火花落在地面余烬扑哧扑哧地跳动像一只小动物随后慢慢被夜色吞没鸠子说结束了呢她没有说结束的是夏天可蜜朗懂两个人之间有一种经过岁月沉淀后的默契句子不必完整意思已经抵达可是当他们拎着水桶回到家阳菜正一边看电视一边玩手机对母亲的招呼没有回应青春期的孩子就
